user.title: Configure Doorbell Popup
user.description: Connect your Reolink doorbell camera to a live popup. Requires the Browser Mod integration.

data_description.camera_entity: The camera entity that shows the live feed.
data_description.doorbell_sensor: Binary sensor that triggers when the doorbell button is pressed.
data_description.open_door_script: Script to run when the Open Door button is tapped in the popup.
data_description.popup_timeout: Seconds before the popup closes automatically if not dismissed.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Make sure it exists and is loaded.

abort.already_configured: Reolink Doorbell Popup is already configured.
